name: Tooltip
description: Tooltip directive provides advisory information for a component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should be disabled.

props.name: id
props.description: When present, it adds a custom id to the tooltip.

props.name: class
props.description: When present, it adds a custom class to the tooltip.

props.name: escape
props.description: By default the tooltip contents are not rendered as text. Set to false to support html tags in the content.

props.name: fitContent
props.description: Automatically adjusts the element position when there is not enough space on the selected position.

props.name: showDelay
props.description: When present, it adds a custom delay to the tooltip's display.

props.name: hideDelay
props.description: When present, it adds a custom delay to the tooltip's hiding.

props.name: autoHide
props.description: Whether to hide tooltip when hovering over tooltip content.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.
